initial_dependency_audit.action: dependency constraints and lock were hardened before acceptance

checks.name: launcher negative controls
checks.detail: no-argument, Cookie, empty/custom path, database, proxy and comment requests were rejected

checks.name: full upstream pytest collection
checks.detail: 84 passed, 8 skipped, 6 failed, 4 subtests passed; all 6 failures require Redis at 127.0.0.1:6379

residual_risks: Platform anti-bot controls and login flows may change without notice.
A successful local test does not grant permission to collect or republish platform content.
The six Redis integration tests remain unexecuted in a real Redis environment because Redis is outside the accepted JSONL-only runtime path.
X/Twitter, Reddit and Instagram require separate implementations.
